Ja | En
AFFILIATION

How to Affiliate with the Seishinkai Karate-do Federation

If you represent a school club, hobby group, community circle, culture school, or other organization that wishes to join Seishinkai, or if you are planning to open a new class, please contact us.
In addition to our regular class activities, we also offer seminars for companies, schools, and circles upon request.

▼ Clubs & Circles Wishing to Affiliate

Circles, school clubs, and hobby groups that don't belong to any particular style often find that no formal rank certificates can be issued, and practice tends to become self-taught.
There are also cases where a group once had an instructor affiliated with a style, but lost that connection due to a transfer or other circumstances and became more of an informal hobby group — some of these groups are now operating as official branches of Seishinkai.
Seishinkai as an organization is not primarily competition-focused, but we place no restriction on members entering other tournaments, including sun-dome (non-contact) or full-contact events.
Many of our members hold ranks earned in other styles※ before transferring to Seishinkai.
Please feel free to contact us for a consultation.

※Wado-ryu, Shotokan-related styles, Goju-ryu, Shito-ryu, Shorinji-ryu, Kyokushin-related styles, Seidokaikan, Ashihara Kaikan, Shorinji Kempo, and others

▼ Culture Schools & Community Classes

If your culture school is considering opening a new class or adding an additional one, please contact us for a consultation.
Seishinkai Karate is currently taught at several culture schools, and our classes rank among the top in terms of enrollment.
Courteous, attentive instruction combined with enjoyable practice is one of the key factors behind this growth in student numbers.

◆ About Our Seminars

If you can gather 5 or more participants, we can arrange a "Health Karate Seminar," a "Women's Self-Defense Seminar," or a seminar for companies, schools, and other organizations.
These seminars can also be used as new-employee training to strengthen mental resilience. We also offer trial/experience seminars for international tourists.
For more details, please contact the Seishinkai office by email.
